why: Disorder should map to clinical condition vocabularies; the real UMLS code index carries ICD-10-CM I48.91 on the billing-specific atrial fibrillation CUI.
Specific diabetes disorder should keep SNOMED CT and ICD-10-CM mappings.
Medication should expose RxNorm and SNOMED CT mappings.
Lab/analyte concept should expose LOINC mappings.
Symptom should expose finding and billing vocabulary mappings.
Active electrolyte abnormality concept should expose its SNOMED CT mapping.
Specific cough finding should expose SNOMED CT and ICD-10-CM mappings.
Septic shock disorder should expose SNOMED CT mapping.
